hero.title: Where Every Story is
hero.subtitle: The world's first video platform to instantly enhance your videos with Captions with Intention, Emotive Audio Descriptions, and inclusive viewing tools - so your stories don't just reach more people, they move them.
hero.headline: Build something better.
hero.description: Create inclusive experiences that meet WCAG and EAA/ADA standards, thanks to the leading platform in digital accessibility and the support of expert services.

inclusivity.title: Inclusivity comes standard
inclusivity.description: Everything from customizable captions to high-contrast colors are baked into every video host with Axessible, so accessibility isn't something you have to think about. It's just the way your videos are.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe that creative expression should be accessible to everyone. Our AI-powered platform transforms video content into immersive experiences that break down barriers and create inclusive storytelling.

dataQuality.title: Data Quality & Ethics
dataQuality.description: Our approach to artificial intelligence is built on principles of transparency, consent, and creative enhancement rather than replacement.

ethicalData.title: Ethical Data Collection
ethicalData.description: We prioritize consent-driven data collection and transparent AI training processes that respect creator rights and user privacy.

powerOfIntentionality.title: The Power of Intentionality
powerOfIntentionality.description: Every algorithm decision is designed to amplify human creativity, not replace it. Our AI serves as a creative collaborator.

builtOnTrust.title: Built on Trust

accessibility.title: Accessibility Features
accessibility.audioDescriptionsDesc: Describes visual elements for screen readers

transcriptTab.title: Transcript Extraction & Character Management
transcriptTab.description: Extract speech from the video with automatic speaker identification and vocal intensity analysis. Captions are automatically enhanced for accessibility.
transcriptTab.autoEnhancedDesc: Speaker identification and vocal intensity analysis run automatically when you generate or load transcripts. Results are applied directly to captions for better accessibility.
transcriptTab.speakerDesc: Manage character colors and connect speakers to characters. Changes update captions immediately and follow the Captions with Intention protocol.

videoAnalysis.title: Video Analysis
videoAnalysis.description: Analyze video content for silent gaps and generate storytelling audio descriptions using AI.
videoAnalysis.silentGapsDesc: Customize the prompt to adjust how silent gaps are detected and described. Will analyze the complete video duration (up to 1 hour) and process up to 100 silent moments for comprehensive coverage.
videoAnalysis.noResults: Run analysis to see silent gaps and narrations.
videoAnalysis.noSegments: No silent segments found in this video.
videoAnalysis.customAnalysisDesc: Enter a custom prompt to extract specific insights from your video content (e.g., generate hashtags, identify themes, extract key quotes, summarize main points).
videoAnalysis.customPromptPlaceholder: Enter a custom prompt to extract specific insights from your video (e.g., generate hashtags, identify themes, extract key quotes, etc.)
videoAnalysis.customPromptExample: e.g. Generate 10 relevant hashtags for this video, or Summarize the main points discussed, or Extract all product mentions...
videoAnalysis.customPromptEmpty: Enter a custom prompt above and click "Analyze" to generate insights.

audioDescEditor.title: Audio Description Generation
audioDescEditor.description: Enable audio descriptions for visual elements in the video.
audioDescEditor.editorDesc: Generate and manage audio descriptions to describe visual elements for accessibility.
audioDescEditor.step1: Step 1: Select your preferred audio description voice from the dropdown above.
audioDescEditor.step2Basic: Basic AI: Quick generation of simple descriptions for common scenarios
audioDescEditor.step2Advanced: Advanced Analysis: Comprehensive video analysis that detects silent moments and generates detailed cinematic descriptions
audioDescEditor.step3: Step 3: After generation, click "Analyze for Extended Audio Description" to check if descriptions fit within dialogue gaps.
audioDescEditor.step4: Step 4: Edit descriptions as needed, then click "Generate Audio" for each segment or "Generate All Audio" for batch processing.
audioDescEditor.step5: Step 5: Save your work using "Save All" to persist changes to the database.

export.title: Export Accessible Video
export.description: Download your video with accessibility features burned-in.
export.noTranscript: Generate a transcript first to enable export with captions.
export.originalPrompt: Need a copy now? Download the original video.
export.captionsDesc: Burn-in word-by-word captions with character colors
export.audioDescDesc: Mix audio descriptions with ducked program audio
export.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one accessibility feature to export.

characterManager.title: Character Management
characterManager.description: Configure character colors, voices, and speech patterns
characterManager.colorAttributionDesc: Assign colors to characters following the Captions with Intention protocol.
characterManager.speakerAssignmentDesc: Map each character to a detected transcript speaker. Colors come from Character Management.
characterManager.name: Name
characterManager.detectedMappingDesc: Map this character to a detected speaker (A, B, C, etc.) for automatic color attribution
characterManager.noCharactersDesc: Add characters to enable color-coded captions
characterManager.guideline1: Main characters use the 6 primary spectrum colors
characterManager.guideline2: Supporting characters use colors between main character colors
characterManager.guideline3: Minor characters use pastel tones from the center of the color wheel
characterManager.guideline4: Hero and Villain should be positioned opposite on the spectrum
characterManager.guideline5: Off-camera dialogue is displayed in italic

speakerMapping.title: Speaker Assignment
speakerMapping.description: Map each character to a detected transcript speaker. Colors come from Character Management.

errors.failedApplyMapping: Failed to apply mapping to transcript segments
errors.failedSaveDatabase: Failed to save mapping to database

hero.description: One production. A different version for each person: your cut, your language, your world. Streaming shows everyone the same thing. Axessplayer does not.

shift.body: The microdrama boom competes on one axis: more content, cheaper, better recommended. Every platform still ships one fixed cut to everyone. The story itself never changes. That is the opening.

yourCut.title: Your cut.
yourCut.body: POV, pacing, intensity, and ending, chosen automatically from how you watch. No menus.

yourLanguage.title: Your language.
yourLanguage.body: One master, every language, accessible by default, at near-zero marginal cost.

yourWorld.title: Your world.
yourWorld.body: The same scene, the right brand for your market. Canon-safe, never an interruption.

how.title: Human soul, AI scale, one engine.
how.body: Filmed scenes carry the soul and the clips. AI generates the variants, the languages, and the localizations. One decision engine reads how each person watches and serves the right cut automatically.

accessible.body: Captions with intention, creative audio description, sign language, and dubbing are generated for every story in every language, not bolted on later. Accessibility is the foundation the whole platform is built on.

brands.body: Dynamic in-scene placement fills a mug, a billboard, or a phone screen with the right brand for each viewer, at serve time. First-party attention and data, without interrupting the story.

whyNow.title: Interactive cinema was tried once. The reasons it failed are gone.
whyNow.body: Production, promotion, and format friction killed it a decade ago. AI generates the variants now. Vertical, swipeable feeds are the native format. We are rebuilding it with the people who invented interactive video.
whyNow.builtBy: Built by the pioneer team behind interactive entertainment.

howToWatch.title: Three ways in. Three ways to pay.

earn.title: Watch a rewarded ad, get credits.

buy.title: Credit packs, whenever you want more.

subscribe.title: Ad-free, with a credit allowance and premium variants.

final.body: Get early access to Axessplayer. We will email you the moment your spot opens.

footer.tagline: One story. Every language. Every person.

creators.body: Tell us about your project. We work with creators across novela, reality, cooking, education, animated series and more.
